missionary.bio: Hi! I'm Michael Gledhill — Elder Gledhill out here. I grew up in Center, Kentucky as the youngest of fore kids in a family that loves the gospel, the out doors, and of cores Civil Air Patrol. I've been a member of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints my whole life, but it was during my senior year of high school that I gained my own testimony — through prayer, scripture study, and watching the gospel transform people around me.
missionary.testimony: I know that God lives and that He knows each of us by name. I know that Jesus Christ is our Savior — not just a historical figure, but a living, present, active force in our lives when we invite Him in. I know that the Book of Mormon is true scripture, and that reading it with real intent will change you. And I know — more than I know almost anything — that this work matters. These 24 months are the best thing I have ever done.

scripture.text: And the Spirit shall be given unto you by the prayer of faith.

messages.name: Tyler H.
messages.message: Miss you man! Keep crushing it out there. Go Cougars!

messages.name: Sister Johnson
messages.message: Your testimony has strengthened mine. Thank you.
